folders.name: 10_WHAT
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT: What exists? The identity, structure and catalogues of the things this memory knows.

folders.name: 11_WHAT_Root
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> What the entity itself is, at the top level (the organisation/program this memory serves).

folders.name: 12_WHAT_OrgStructure
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> The org chart as a model/structure (boxes and reporting lines).

folders.name: 13_WHAT_SystemTree
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> The tree of systems/products the entity owns (functional identity).

folders.name: 14_WHAT_DataModel
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> The schema of business entities (the shape of a 'request', a ticket, an incident).

folders.name: 15_WHAT_Catalogs
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> Closed taxonomies / controlled vocabularies of the business.

folders.name: 16_WHAT_Services
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> The catalogue of services/products the entity delivers.

folders.name: 17_WHAT_Assets
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> Classes of assets / instruments / equipment.

folders.name: 18_WHAT_Standards
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHAT -> External/internal specs that DEFINE (norms, formats).

folders.name: 19_WHAT_Reserved
folders.summary: Reserved slot in the WHAT family (spare / future subcategory).

folders.name: 20_WHY
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY: Why does the entity exist and act this way? Purpose, mission, values, decisions (the deep 'why').

folders.name: 21_WHY_Purpose
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> The ultimate reason the entity exists.

folders.name: 22_WHY_Mission
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> What we do, permanently.

folders.name: 23_WHY_Vision
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> The aspirational future, undated.

folders.name: 24_WHY_Values
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> The values and beliefs the entity holds.

folders.name: 25_WHY_Principles
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> Guiding operating principles.

folders.name: 26_WHY_Objectives
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> Qualitative strategic objectives / OKRs.

folders.name: 27_WHY_ValueProposition
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> The value proposition + why stakeholders matter.

folders.name: 28_WHY_Decisions
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> Decision rationale / ADRs (the 'why' of each decision).

folders.name: 29_WHY_Impact
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHY -> The positive impact pursued.

folders.name: 30_HOW
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW: How does it work? Playbooks, procedures, processes, methods, knowledge, integrations, policies (the definition, not the run).

folders.name: 31_HOW_Playbooks
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> End-to-end scenarios (a full play).

folders.name: 32_HOW_Procedures
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> Step-by-step SOPs.

folders.name: 33_HOW_Processes
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> State machines / process definitions.

folders.name: 34_HOW_Methods
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> Methodologies.

folders.name: 35_HOW_KnowledgeBase
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> Reference knowledge that informs operation.

folders.name: 36_HOW_Integrations
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> How to connect to external systems.

folders.name: 37_HOW_Policies
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> Operating policies.

folders.name: 38_HOW_Templates
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> Output / business templates.

folders.name: 39_HOW_Automations
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOW -> What the agents/automations do.

folders.name: 40_WHO
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO: Who is involved? Every actor: roles, units, people, teams, partners, suppliers, contacts, stakeholders, agents.

folders.name: 41_WHO_Roles
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Roles & responsibilities (RACI); roles-not-persons.

folders.name: 42_WHO_Org
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Units / departments.

folders.name: 43_WHO_People
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Real people / PII. RESTRICTED, no-RAG.

folders.name: 44_WHO_Teams
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Teams / working groups (cross-cutting).

folders.name: 45_WHO_Partners
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Partners / collaborations.

folders.name: 46_WHO_Suppliers
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Commercial suppliers / vendors.

folders.name: 47_WHO_Contacts
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Contact / distribution lists.

folders.name: 48_WHO_Stakeholders
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> Stakeholder register (the entity).

folders.name: 49_WHO_Agents
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHO -> AI agents as entities.

folders.name: 50_WHERE
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE: Where? Physical locations, sites, compute environments, networks, work context, zones.

folders.name: 51_WHERE_LocationTree
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE -> Physical locations (buildings/sites tree).

folders.name: 52_WHERE_Sites
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE -> Sites / campuses (macro).

folders.name: 53_WHERE_Compute
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE -> Compute environments (where data runs).

folders.name: 54_WHERE_Networks
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE -> Network topology / segments.

folders.name: 55_WHERE_Field
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE -> Work context: office vs field/on-site.

folders.name: 56_WHERE_Zones
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE -> Security / access zones, TLP.

folders.name: 57_WHERE_External
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHERE -> Third-party premises.

folders.name: 58_WHERE_Reserved
folders.summary: Reserved slot in the WHERE family (spare / future subcategory).

folders.name: 59_WHERE_Reserved
folders.summary: Reserved slot in the WHERE family (spare / future subcategory).

folders.name: 60_WHEN
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN: When? Planned calendar, schedules, cadences, on-call, milestones, triggers, roadmap. The 'should', not the 'was'.

folders.name: 61_WHEN_Calendar
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN -> Planned by-the-hour events (calendar).

folders.name: 62_WHEN_Schedule
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN -> Planned person x day grid / shifts (rota).

folders.name: 63_WHEN_Cadences
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN -> Recurring rhythms.

folders.name: 64_WHEN_OnCall
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN -> Planned on-call rotations.

folders.name: 65_WHEN_Milestones
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN -> Future milestones / deadlines.

folders.name: 66_WHEN_Triggers
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN -> Future triggers / conditions / reminders.

folders.name: 67_WHEN_Roadmap
folders.summary: 5W2H - WHEN -> Phased roadmap (MVP / Phase 2 / Future).

folders.name: 68_WHEN_Reserved
folders.summary: Reserved slot in the WHEN family (spare / future subcategory).

folders.name: 69_WHEN_Reserved
folders.summary: Reserved slot in the WHEN family (spare / future subcategory).

folders.name: 70_HOWMUCH
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH: How much? The quantitative face of any topic: budget, procurement, costs, effort, metrics, resources, risks.

folders.name: 71_HOWMUCH_Budget
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH -> Budgets / planned amounts.

folders.name: 72_HOWMUCH_Procurement
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH -> The master procurement file (amount/status of a purchase).

folders.name: 73_HOWMUCH_Costs
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH -> Actual costs / estimates.

folders.name: 74_HOWMUCH_Effort
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH -> Effort / capacity, planned-vs-reported.

folders.name: 75_HOWMUCH_Metrics
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH -> KPIs / sizing figures.

folders.name: 76_HOWMUCH_Resources
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH -> Quantities (licenses, quotas, headcount).

folders.name: 77_HOWMUCH_Risks
folders.summary: 5W2H - HOWMUCH -> Risk = severity x likelihood.

folders.name: 78_HOWMUCH_Reserved
folders.summary: Reserved slot in the HOWMUCH family (spare / future subcategory).

folders.summary: Reserved slot in the HOWMUCH family (spare / future subcategory).
